Flexbox layout container for arranging children in a row or column.

# When to use

- One-dimensional layouts: toolbars, button groups, form rows

# Usage

1. Choose direction: default row, or `vertical=true` for a column stack.
2. Set `gap` to a preset or custom size.

Minimal row (docs snippet — not a live preview):

```rust
view! {
    <Flex gap=FlexGap::Medium>
        <Button>"Save"</Button>
        <Button appearance=ButtonAppearance::Secondary>"Cancel"</Button>
    </Flex>
}
```

# Best Practices

## Do's

* Use `gap` instead of margin hacks between items.

# Examples

## Default row
<!-- preview -->
```rust
view! { <div data-testid="flex-preview">"demo"</div> }
```
